3.0 Summary and Recommendations 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 11 

3.0 Summary and Recommendations 

The CCW team will no longer produce the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions file after the 2021 data file; it is available for 
data years 2000–2021.6 The CCW team will only deliver the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions file going forward. The CCW 
team recommends researchers switch to using the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions files as
